description: Franchise-specific memory rules for RetroDex illustration prompt packs. These rules override generic bucket direction when a title match is found.

rules.main_subject: a small child-sized adventurer seen from behind on the left foreground with a short sword at their side
rules.environment: a calm island shoreline looking across open water toward a single steep mountain island placed on the right side, with a smooth egg-shaped shrine integrated at its summit
rules.action_mood_cue: standing still after reaching the shore, facing the distant island in sea wind
rules.composition: small child-sized figure anchored in the lower-left foreground, broad reflective water across the center, one dominant mountain island on the right third, a clear egg-shaped summit, simple clouds, screen-like framing, and strong negative space
rules.memory_hook: portable island adventure, quiet arrival after the shore, and a single egg-crowned destination on the horizon
legal_watchouts: avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art
avoid official shield and hat details
avoid exact Wind Fish egg iconography

rules.main_subject: a small solitary adventurer with a simple sword and round shield
rules.environment: a windswept fantasy field or shoreline facing one monumental ancient landmark on the horizon
rules.action_mood_cue: pausing in the wind before the journey continues
rules.composition: small foreground subject, one dominant distant landmark, broad open space, clean sky and very low clutter
rules.memory_hook: solitary overworld discovery, mythic destination, and horizon-driven adventure

rules.main_subject: a lone armored explorer with an arm-mounted tool
rules.environment: an alien cavern with massive biomechanical pillars, acid glow, and a dark passage ahead
rules.action_mood_cue: aiming the arm-mounted tool into the dark in hostile silence
rules.composition: single explorer foreground, one clear passage, deep cavern layers, sparse readable glow
rules.memory_hook: exploration, alien solitude, and hostile vertical space

rules.main_subject: a lone covert operative with compact futuristic gear
rules.environment: a sterile data-vault corridor with glass, consoles, and cold security light
rules.action_mood_cue: advancing cautiously toward a sealed breach
rules.composition: single operative only, corridor depth, no trench coat, no fedora, minimal props
rules.memory_hook: covert infiltration, sci-fi espionage, and cold facility tension
legal_watchouts: avoid franchise logos or device designs

rules.main_subject: a nearly complete wall of interlocking blocks with one falling piece above a tight gap
rules.environment: a tall glowing playfield seen head-on like a handheld puzzle screen in the dark
rules.action_mood_cue: caught one instant before the final drop locks into place
rules.composition: single vertical playfield, one falling piece, no isometric explosion, no extra decoration
rules.memory_hook: falling rhythm, spatial pressure, and instant readability
legal_watchouts: avoid official block arrangements from known promo art

rules.main_subject: a small agile explorer running forward
rules.environment: a rounded toy-like 3D course with grassy slopes, chunky stone ledges, and a distant tower doorway
rules.action_mood_cue: mid-stride on a clear route toward the landmark
rules.composition: single explorer only, one readable route, rounded hills, no abstract block maze
rules.memory_hook: open 3D platform course, toy-like movement, and landmark-driven exploration

rules.main_subject: a small agile explorer in side view
rules.environment: a theatrical side-scrolling platform course with layered block islands, suspended platforms, and open sky
rules.action_mood_cue: caught in a clean upward leap over a gap
rules.composition: single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, no crowd, no abstract stripes
rules.memory_hook: 2D jump rhythm, stage-like worlds, and forward platform momentum

rules.main_subject: a lone duelist with a large blade
rules.environment: a wind-swept stone platform before a monumental ring gate and distant ruins
rules.action_mood_cue: holding a poised guard stance just before the duel begins
rules.composition: single duelist only, one readable blade, no crowd, one monumental landmark behind
rules.memory_hook: weapon-based duel, sacred arena, and pre-impact tension

rules.main_subject: a lone street fighter in a tight guard stance
rules.environment: a neon-lit concrete rooftop or industrial training floor at night
rules.action_mood_cue: framed before impact under one harsh backlight
rules.composition: single fighter only, no crowd, low camera, one dominant light source, strong shadow
rules.memory_hook: close-range pressure, impact timing, and urban combat attitude

rules.main_subject: a small young trainer silhouette with a compact bag
rules.environment: a quiet path by tall grass and water under a night sky, with one distant tower-like landmark
rules.action_mood_cue: pausing at the edge of the route as if something rare might appear
rules.composition: single young trainer only, low grass in the foreground, one distant landmark, no monster in frame, calm portable scale
rules.memory_hook: night journey, tall grass suspense, and a quiet world that invites exploration
legal_watchouts: avoid franchise color blocking or logos

rules.main_subject: a stout treasure hunter in side view carrying a sack
rules.environment: a compact ruin or cliffside path with coins, bricks, and a visible drop below
rules.action_mood_cue: planting their feet before pushing deeper toward treasure
rules.composition: single stout explorer only, side-view platform read, one treasure cue, chunky foreground shapes
rules.memory_hook: weighty movement, treasure pursuit, and compact portable platforming
legal_watchouts: avoid official hat and mustache codes

rules.main_subject: a lone agile cyber warrior with an energy blade
rules.environment: a ruined red-orange industrial battlefield with broken columns and warning lights
rules.action_mood_cue: standing ready just before a dash into danger
rules.composition: single cyber warrior only, one clear blade silhouette, slashed ruins behind, no crowd
rules.memory_hook: fast dash combat, ruined future battlefield, and sharp handheld intensity

rules.main_subject: a lone ninja on a slanted rooftop
rules.environment: a moonlit city roofline with layered temple and city silhouettes in the distance
rules.action_mood_cue: pausing in stealth before the next leap
rules.composition: single ninja only, strong rooftop diagonal, moonlight outline, sparse skyline
rules.memory_hook: roofline traversal, stealth tension, and fast ninja momentum
legal_watchouts: avoid specific scarf or weapon designs

rules.main_subject: a lone rider beside a long-necked desert flyer silhouette
rules.environment: a wide desert ruin with broken towers, wind, and a pale sky
rules.action_mood_cue: looking out before a dangerous journey across empty airspace
rules.composition: single rider and one flying mount silhouette, broad horizon, ruined towers, no crowd
rules.memory_hook: desert flight, ancient ruins, and melancholic skybound travel
legal_watchouts: avoid franchise saddle or armor designs

rules.main_subject: a small solitary adventurer with a short sword and plain shield
rules.environment: a rainy fantasy field and forest edge with one distant stone castle gate glowing faintly through the storm
rules.action_mood_cue: moving forward through wind and rain toward the distant gate
rules.composition: single small figure in the lower foreground, diagonal rain, one distant gate landmark, broad field read, and strong storm contrast
rules.memory_hook: storm opening, lonely journey, and one mythic destination pulling the player forward

rules.main_subject: a small agile explorer in side view
rules.environment: a bright side-scrolling course with rounded grassy hills, chunky ledges, and a clear path of platforms rising upward
rules.action_mood_cue: caught in a clean forward leap from one ledge to the next
rules.composition: single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, rounded hill backdrop, and no crowd or decorative clutter
rules.memory_hook: clean jump rhythm, rounded hills, and cheerful forward platform momentum
legal_watchouts: avoid exact pipe or block layouts

rules.main_subject: a small speed-focused runner silhouette leaning forward
rules.environment: a bright sloped coastal course with palm silhouettes, layered cliffs, and one dramatic downhill curve
rules.action_mood_cue: accelerating hard down the slope with the background streaking behind
rules.composition: single runner only, one dominant slope, low horizon, speed lines, and no crowd or extra props
rules.memory_hook: slope-driven speed, coastal energy, and forward momentum you can read instantly
legal_watchouts: avoid official shoe or quill shapes

rules.main_subject: a compact armored android with an arm-mounted blaster
rules.environment: a ruined elevated highway at dusk with broken road slabs, warning lights, and a burning skyline
rules.action_mood_cue: standing ready before a charge into the collapsing route ahead
rules.composition: single android only, one broken highway path, one clear horizon, and sharp industrial contrast
rules.memory_hook: intro-stage urgency, ruined future highways, and fast action-platformer pressure
legal_watchouts: avoid Mega Man X armor likeness

rules.main_subject: a lone commando silhouette with a heavy rifle
rules.environment: a blasted urban or military skyline under an alien-lit night sky with smoke and debris
rules.action_mood_cue: bracing for the next wave under impossible pressure
rules.composition: single commando only, one weapon read, one skyline, broad smoke shapes, and no squad or crowd
rules.memory_hook: run-and-gun pressure, impossible odds, and pure arcade escalation

rules.main_subject: a compact bright tank at the head of a column
rules.environment: a handheld-style battlefield with one river crossing, a bridge, forest tiles, and open sky
rules.action_mood_cue: rolling into position before the next tactical push
rules.composition: single tank as focal point, clear battlefield lanes, one bridge landmark, and map-like readability without becoming a diagram
rules.memory_hook: portable tactics, bright battlefield clarity, and one decisive frontline push

rules.main_subject: a single mine cart racing along a broken jungle track
rules.environment: a dense jungle ravine with wooden rails, deep foliage, and a bright gap ahead
rules.action_mood_cue: caught one beat before the cart launches over a broken section
rules.composition: single mine cart only, one clear rail path, layered jungle depth, and no character crowding the frame
rules.memory_hook: jungle platforming speed, mine cart danger, and heavy momentum over a gap

rules.main_subject: a tiny round traveler silhouette floating beneath a simple parasol
rules.environment: a soft monochrome sky over rounded hills and sparse clouds
rules.action_mood_cue: drifting gently above the landscape in portable calm
rules.composition: single floating traveler only, wide sky, very low clutter, rounded hill read, and strong Game Boy value separation
rules.memory_hook: portable softness, floating movement, and calm dream-land traversal

rules.main_subject: a single armored walking machine with a rider silhouette
rules.environment: a snowy ridge at dusk with distant industrial lights and heavy cloud cover
rules.action_mood_cue: advancing slowly through the snow toward the glowing city below
rules.composition: single walking machine only, wide snow field, one distant city glow, and a strong diagonal march line
rules.memory_hook: snowbound opening, magitek march, and the feeling of a huge story about to unfold

rules.main_subject: a small suburban kid silhouette with a simple bat-like shape held low
rules.environment: a quiet neighborhood street at night with one glowing crater or meteor-like light source ahead
rules.action_mood_cue: approaching the strange glow with cautious curiosity
rules.composition: single kid silhouette only, one suburban street read, one glowing crater landmark, and lots of quiet negative space
rules.memory_hook: ordinary suburb disrupted by cosmic weirdness and the beginning of an odd journey
legal_watchouts: avoid Mr. Saturn or enemy silhouettes
avoid exact meteor framing from official art

rules.main_subject: a small young adventurer with a plain sword held low
rules.environment: a bright forest clearing with one giant ancient tree stump and soft magical light filtering through leaves
rules.action_mood_cue: pausing in wonder before stepping deeper into the forest
rules.composition: single young adventurer only, one large tree landmark, layered forest depth, and soft 16-bit light with low clutter
rules.memory_hook: bright forest mystery, youthful quest energy, and an iconic sacred clearing

rules.main_subject: a lone vampire hunter silhouette with a long coiled whip-like weapon
rules.environment: a stormy stone bridge before a massive gothic castle under moonlight
rules.action_mood_cue: squaring up before the approach with cloak and rain pulled by the wind
rules.composition: single hunter only, one bridge line toward the castle, one readable whip arc, heavy moonlit contrast, and no crowd
rules.memory_hook: storm bridge approach, gothic ascent, and a dramatic castle confrontation
legal_watchouts: avoid exact whip pose from key art

rules.main_subject: a single futuristic hovercraft with a bold wedge shape
rules.environment: a neon anti-gravity track suspended above a vast city or void with luminous lane edges
rules.action_mood_cue: banking hard into a high-speed turn with sparks and light trails
rules.composition: single vehicle only, one strong track curve, low clutter, bright lane lights, and clear forward speed
rules.memory_hook: impossible speed, anti-gravity racing, and one iconic hovercraft line through space

rules.main_subject: a lone ninja silhouette with a raised short blade
rules.environment: a night city cliff or rooftop edge with hard moonlight and deep urban shadows below
rules.action_mood_cue: balanced before a decisive leap into danger
rules.composition: single ninja only, one strong diagonal edge, moonlit sky, sparse city lights, and no crowd
rules.memory_hook: precise ninja action, rooftop danger, and hard-edged arcade drama

rules.main_subject: a short stocky jumper with a round nose, thick mustache, simple cap, and bright overalls
rules.environment: a compact Game Boy platform course with oversized coins, rounded blocks, and one tall toy-like landmark in the distance
rules.action_mood_cue: caught in a buoyant leap toward the next platform
rules.composition: single jumper only, side-view read, one clean jump arc, chunky portable terrain, and very strong Game Boy value separation
rules.memory_hook: portable Mario-like jump rhythm, giant-coin world energy, and compact handheld platforming
legal_watchouts: avoid exact Mario face or costume details

rules.main_subject: a lone gothic adventurer climbing a steep staircase with a long weapon at their side
rules.environment: a towering haunted keep with moonlight, broken arches, and a storm-dark sky
rules.action_mood_cue: ascending toward the castle interior with grim resolve
rules.composition: single adventurer only, one dramatic stair line, one keep silhouette, moonlit contrast, and no crowd
rules.memory_hook: stairway ascent, old-school gothic danger, and the feeling of a hard castle campaign
legal_watchouts: avoid official whip silhouette if too exact

rules.main_subject: a stout climber under a hanging platform with one large ape-like silhouette above
rules.environment: a vertical construction-site puzzle space with girders, ladders, and a few rolling barrel-like hazards
rules.action_mood_cue: mid-climb in a tense rescue-puzzle moment
rules.composition: single climber foreground and one large ape silhouette as distant threat, strong vertical read, and sparse puzzle geometry
rules.memory_hook: ladders, girders, barrels, and a tense arcade climb with instant readability
legal_watchouts: avoid exact construction layout from arcade screens

rules.main_subject: a tiny round traveler with simple feet and bright eyes riding a star-like trail
rules.environment: a soft side-scrolling dream sky with rounded clouds and a layered pastel horizon
rules.action_mood_cue: gliding joyfully through the air in a clean arc
rules.composition: single round traveler only, one star trail, wide sky, very low clutter, and clean side-view readability
rules.memory_hook: floaty dreamland movement, star ride energy, and cheerful handheld-to-console charm

rules.main_subject: a short stocky cartoon racer in a tiny kart with a simple cap and overalls silhouette
rules.environment: a bright Mode 7-style track bend with bold curbs, coins, and drifting dust
rules.action_mood_cue: sliding through the turn with the kart angled dramatically across the lane
rules.composition: single kart only, one bold track curve, top-down depth cues, bright SNES colors, and no rival crowd
rules.memory_hook: Mode 7 drift energy, small kart silhouette, and bright competitive chaos reduced to one clean turn
legal_watchouts: avoid exact Mario face or costume details

rules.main_subject: two martial artists in a side-on faceoff with clear contrasting stances
rules.environment: a simple open-air dojo or street-side arena with one flat floor plane and a distant backdrop
rules.action_mood_cue: frozen a split second before the opening strike
rules.composition: two fighters only, side-view read, one clean arena line, no crowd, and strong 16-bit contrast
rules.memory_hook: classic versus read, mirrored stances, and immediate arcade fighting-game tension

rules.main_subject: a small young trainer silhouette with a cap and compact bag
rules.environment: a quiet route with tall grass, a dirt path, and one simple town or tower landmark in the distance
rules.action_mood_cue: pausing at the edge of the grass as if something rare might appear
rules.composition: single trainer only, handheld scale, low grass foreground, one distant landmark, no creature in frame, and clear route readability
rules.memory_hook: portable route exploration, tall-grass suspense, and the feeling of setting out from a small town

rules.main_subject: a small child-sized adventurer with a short sword and round shield
rules.environment: a compact handheld fantasy route with one striking seasonal or time-worn landmark ahead
rules.action_mood_cue: stepping carefully into a mysterious overworld shaped by time or changing seasons
rules.composition: single small adventurer only, one dominant landmark, broad readable path, and strong Game Boy color separation
rules.memory_hook: portable Zelda exploration, puzzle-like overworld mystery, and one memorable world-state hook

rules.main_subject: a short determined boxer in gloves seen from the ring corner
rules.environment: a bright boxing ring with one huge opponent silhouette looming across the ropes
rules.action_mood_cue: bouncing lightly just before the opening bell
rules.composition: one small boxer foreground, one large opponent silhouette background, ring ropes framing the space, and no crowd detail

rules.main_subject: a small blue armored android with a rounded arm blaster

rules.main_subject: a small duck-like treasure hunter silhouette with a cane

rules.main_subject: a friendly long-snouted dinosaur-like mount carrying a tiny bundled rider
rules.environment: a pastel storybook platform landscape with rounded hills, flowers, and soft layered clouds

rules.main_subject: a lone pale swordsman silhouette in a long coat
rules.environment: a moonlit castle hall with one towering gothic window and drifting mist

rules.main_subject: a lone spiky-haired swordsman silhouette on an industrial catwalk

rules.action_mood_cue: pausing on the catwalk before descending into a larger mission
rules.composition: single swordsman only, one catwalk line, one giant reactor glow, broad city depth, and no crowd
rules.memory_hook: reactor mission tension, industrial fantasy scale, and one lone mercenary against a giant city-machine

rules.action_mood_cue: standing in reflective tension just before a duel or departure
rules.composition: single cadet only, one elegant terrace line, open night air, and refined PS1-era pixel mood
rules.memory_hook: academy tension, duel readiness, and the cool melancholy of a military fantasy world

rules.main_subject: a lone young knight silhouette holding a plain sword beside a banner
